# Codebase Context Ecosystem

This ecosystem packages a thin orchestration agent and one export skill for
building a single markdown context file from a repository.

## Members
- Root agent:
  [codebase-context.agent.md](../../agents/codebase-context.agent.md)
- Skills:
  [codebase-context-export](../../skills/codebase-context-export/SKILL.md)

## Install Payload
- Copy the listed agent file from `.github/agents/`.
- Copy the listed skill directory from `.github/skills/`.
- Copy the ecosystem-owned files listed in frontmatter from
  `.github/ecosystems/codebase-context/`.
- Copy the audit files listed in frontmatter from
  `.github/ecosystems/codebase-context/`.
- Copy this manifest into the target project's `.github/ecosystems/` tree.
- Treat the listed agents, skills, ecosystem-owned files, audit files, and this
  manifest as the full install/remove ownership contract.
- Keep installable markdown artifacts self-contained to that manifest-owned
  payload. Relative repository-local links inside installed agents, skills,
  and this manifest must resolve to manifest-owned paths.

## Notes
- The generator's default output path is `CODEBASE_CONTEXT.md` at the target
  repository root, but callers can override it when needed.
- Explicit user pickup rules override the default broad export behavior.
- Ecosystem-specific audits are declared through this manifest's `audit-files`
  and applied by the shared `ecosystem-audit` platform.
- Runtime output such as `CODEBASE_CONTEXT.md` is generated by the shipped
  helper and is not part of the manifest-owned install payload.
